feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: Natural Mannose-Containing Glycans as Gut Modulators: A Mechanistic and Translational Perspective

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: W Shang, M Wang, F Tian, G Wei, M Zhou, B Yan... - Trends in Food Science & ..., 2026

Abstract: ... This review summarizes recent advances concerning the sources, structural characteristics, and gut-modulating mechanisms of natural mannose-containing glycans, with a focus on their prebiotic , immunomodulatory, and barrier-protective ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: Microbial Evolution and Systematics: Archaea and Bacteria

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: H Ay - Progress in molecular and subcellular biology, 2026

Abstract: The origin of life on Earth is a profound biological question, with Bacteria and Archaea-the two principal prokaryotic lineages-central to the inquiry. Together, they represent microbial diversity and offer insights into Earth's earliest biosphere and ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology, Reviewer, Too: Origin of Life

entry.title: Ensayo Alumnos en Condicion de Vulnerabilidad

entry.content:

Abstract: ... the emergence of life from chemistry is not miraculous, not lucky, and not improbable — it is thermodynamically inevitable. The proof rests on three pillars: Gibbs free energy (every step on the abiogenesis ... Every major step on the ...

entry.content:

entry.title: Prebiotic Low FODMAP Foods

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: RDN Jody Garlick

Abstract: ... As you can see, just because onions and garlic are limited on the low FODMAP diet, that doesn't mean you can't get your prebiotic fiber from foods. The best way to get enough prebiotic fiber in your diet is to include a large variety of low FODMAP ...

entry.title: Influence of media composition and prebiotic -based protectants on the growth and storage stability of probiotic Lactobacillus pentosus A6

author.name: origins of life"|"origin of life"|"emergence of ...

entry.content:
Authors: R Jawan, R Ahmad Basir, AA Abdul Wahid - IOP Conference Series: Earth and ..., 2026

Abstract: Probiotic lactic acid bacteria are live microorganisms that confer health benefits when consumed in adequate viable counts; however, their strain-specific growth depends on factors such as nutrient media composition, and to ensure their stability ...
